note: Secondary occurrence counts must never be reported as unique Tier-1 population counts.

counting_unit.overlap_count: all secondary rows are overlaps by definition
counting_unit.secondary_reason_occurrence_count: distinct cases with this secondary reason
counting_unit.unique_case_count: same as secondary for this table
